title: NU1903 advisory on transitive SQLitePCLRaw.lib.e_sqlite3
evidence: src/BookApi/BookApi.csproj:11 pulls Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Sqlite 10.0.9, whose transitive SQLitePCLRaw native package raises a NU1903 known-vulnerability advisory at build (per _agent_stdout.log); no non-breaking patched version published
suggestion: Track the EF Core Sqlite provider for a patched release and bump when available; advisory does not block build

title: Unused Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory package reference
evidence: src/BookApi/BookApi.csproj:10 references Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory 10.0.9, but no source or test file references the InMemory provider (grep for 'InMemory' in *.cs returns nothing; tests use SqliteConnection ':memory:')

title: No explicit error handling around EF Core persistence
evidence: src/BookApi/Controllers/BooksController.cs:32,78,93 call SaveChangesAsync with no try/catch; relies on framework default 500 on DB errors
suggestion: Optional: add handling for DB constraint/concurrency errors if hardening beyond the task spec
